value="Select One-time Billing Run's from the DB which Type of Execution is <b>Exact Date</b> or <b>Immediately. </b>And Billing Run's status is<b> Initial</b><br><br>When type is Exact Date, system should select only those billing run's in which Date is selected as a <b>current day</b> or in the <b>past</b>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;glass=0;strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;" value="JOB should run every minute to check which one-time billing run should be started" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;glass=0;strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;" parent="WIyWlLk6GJQsqaUBKTNV-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="553.75" width="155" height="67.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zZ8-GSjJKxaS1axGZIsC-181" value="If JOB has run, however it is not finished in one minute, system should wait until it's finished before starting new instance<br style="border-color: var(--border-color);"><br style="border-color: var(--border-color);">For example, JOB runs at 14:00 and it is not finished until 14:03, it is not possible to start second iteration at 14:01 and 14:04 will be its start date&nbsp;" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;glass=0;strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;" parent="WIyWlLk6GJQsqaUBKTNV-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="2835" y="538.25" width="260" height="98" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zZ8-GSjJKxaS1axGZIsC-236" value="X" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;glass=0;strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;" parent="WIyWlLk6GJQsqaUBKTNV-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="3160" y="558" width="55" height="57.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zZ8-GSjJKxaS1axGZIsC-238" value="X" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;glass=0;strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;" parent="WIyWlLk6GJQsqaUBKTNV-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1470" y="284.77" width="50" height="49.53" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qVMsPwyBgHPwsVbEazi_-0" value="<b>Comments(TINA):</b><div>1. JOB should start all types of billing runs which has execution type exact date&nbsp;</div><div>2. If Start after process is checked and doesn't exist such billing run from periodic it shouldn't be started&nbsp;</div><div>3. Start after process should check only billing runs which are created current day (past days doesn't interest)&nbsp;</div><div>4. incompatible processes&nbsp; -according process should check only statuses&nbsp;</div>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="WIyWlLk6GJQsqaUBKTNV-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="810" width="460" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 250px;

b.font: Start already created one-time Billing Run

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 498px; margin-left: 331px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Select One-time Billing Run's from the DB which Type of Execution is Exact Date or Immediately. And Billing Run's status is Initial
When type is Exact Date, system should select only those billing run's in which Date is selected as a current day or in the past

div.div: JOB should run every minute to check which one-time billing run should be started

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 311px; height: 1px; padding-top: 350px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
If JOB has run, however it is not finished in one minute, system should wait until it's finished before starting new instance
For example, JOB runs at 14:00 and it is not finished until 14:03, it is not possible to start second iteration at 14:01 and 14:04 will be its start date

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 458px; height: 1px; padding-top: 800px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.div: 1. JOB should start all types of billing runs which has execution type exact date
2. If Start after process is checked and doesn't exist such billing run from periodic it shouldn't be started
3. Start after process should check only billing runs which are created current day (past days doesn't interest)
4. incompatible processes -according process should check only statuses
